description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a robust, slightly curved wooden handle with a textured grain and a dark brown grip wrap at the base. The axe head is large, wedge-shaped, and made of dark, weathered metal, showing signs of wear and a rough, hammered finish. The blade is broad with a single sharp edge and a pronounced point, while the poll is flat and squared off. The head is mounted onto the handle with a traditional socket, and the upper part of the handle is reinforced with a metal collar. Decorative engravings or markings are visible on the metal collar, adding a touch of craftsmanship. The overall design suggests a utilitarian tool, suitable for chopping or splitting tasks in an urban or workshop setting.
description: A rugged hand axe with a curved wooden handle, dark grip, and a broad, weathered metal blade featuring decorative engravings on the collar.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed blade, engraved metal collar, and the full length of the wooden handle with a wrapped grip.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wedge-shaped, weathered metal blade and the curvature of the wooden handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat poll of the axe head, the handle's grain, and the grip wrap at the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the blade's thickness, the mounting socket, and the handle's ergonomic curve.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with visible grain, ergonomic shape, and a dark brown leather-wrapped grip at the base; oval cross-section.
attribute_blade_design: Broad, wedge-shaped single-edged blade with a pointed tip, flat poll, and decorative engravings on the metal collar; no beard.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional socket mounting with a metal collar securing the blade to the handle.
attribute_visible_markings_or_labels: decorative engravings on the metal collar
